name: Tension Rising
description:
Tensions have been rising within the survivor group lately, the peace within the cabin on the verge of shattering. Everybody is inches away from snapping at one another, or perhaps breaking into an all-out fight.

The Spectre is delighted.

The killers don't care.

What will become of the survivors' fragile truce?

Canon characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure.

Slasher/Jason, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1, Noli.

OCs:

Yui (Pick-Me)

Fed'Rah (Reddit-scrolling, podcast-listening creep)

This was a request, I hope I did them all justice! I took some creative liberties with adding in Azure as a survivor, I hope he's fine this way!

Hey...

Drink water or else Fed'Rah will be in your walls at 3:33am (not click bait).
creator: Subconscious
